title: centaurea aggregata
intro: Centaurea aggregata, also known as Mountain Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Centaurea aggregata include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and its dried flowers and leaves can be used in herbal infusions.
